name: Timing engine internal verification = CONSISTENCY, not clinical validity

source_receipts.source_file: artistry7_integration::governance (derived from manuscript RUO statements + limitation sections)
source_receipts.anchor: Timing engine internal verification = CONSISTENCY, not clinical validity

verbatim_evidence.claim: 95.6% exact-day agreement confirms the engine reproduces a reference PFI derivation (algorithmic consistency). It is NOT evidence of clinical validity or outcome prediction. The ARIEL3 external comparison is equivalence-INCONCLUSIVE (TOST p=0.073, underpowered), NOT a positive equivalence result.
